mods.name: Performance Intake
mods.description: A high-flow intake for the B58 engine improves turbo spool sound and provides a small bump in airflow. The stock airbox is already well-designed.
mods.partNumbers: aFe Momentum GT 54-76901, HKS Super Flow Intake
mods.installNotes: Remove stock airbox lid and filter. Install new intake tube and filter assembly. Ensure MAF sensor housing matches diameter. 20 minute install.

mods.name: Catback Exhaust
mods.description: Unlock the B58 inline-6 exhaust note with an aftermarket catback. The stock exhaust is very quiet — an aftermarket system transforms the character.
mods.partNumbers: HKS Hi-Power Spec-L 31019-AT003, AWE Track Edition
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from the mid-pipe flange back. Dual exit matches factory bumper cutouts. No cutting required. 1 hour on jack stands.

mods.name: Lowering Springs
mods.description: Lower the A90 Supra 20–30mm for a more aggressive stance and sharper turn-in. The factory adaptive dampers remain fully functional.
mods.installNotes: Spring compressor needed. Swap at all four corners. Adaptive damper coding not required. Alignment mandatory. Slight rubbing possible at full drop on aggressive wheel setups.

mods.name: B58 ECU Tune (MHD/Bootmod3)
mods.description: Flash the B58 ECU for 80–100hp gains on stock hardware. The B58 responds incredibly well to tuning with massive headroom in the factory fuel system.
mods.partNumbers: MHD Flasher A90 license, Bootmod3 Stage 1 license
mods.installNotes: Flash via OBD-II Bluetooth adapter using phone app. Start with Stage 1 on 93 octane. The B58 has factory overbuilt fuel system that supports Stage 1 with no hardware changes. Log boost and AFR.

mods.name: Performance Downpipe
mods.description: Replace the restrictive factory catalytic converter with a high-flow catted or catless downpipe for significantly faster turbo spool and 30–40hp gains when tuned.
mods.partNumbers: VRSF B58 Downpipe, HKS Metal Catalyzer 33005-AT004
mods.installNotes: Access from below on a lift. Pre-soak turbo outlet bolts. Must retune after install. O2 sensor spacer or software fix needed for catless to avoid CEL. 2 hour install.

mods.name: Upgraded Intercooler
mods.description: A larger intercooler prevents heat soak during spirited driving or track sessions. The stock unit is adequate for daily use but falls short under sustained load.
mods.installNotes: Remove front bumper and crash bar. Stock intercooler unbolts from charge pipe connections. New unit uses factory mounting points with minor bracket adjustments. 2–3 hours.

mods.name: Upgraded Turbocharger
mods.description: Swap the stock turbo for a larger unit to push the B58 beyond 500whp. The factory engine internals support this power level reliably.
mods.partNumbers: Pure Turbos Stage 2, Vargas Turbo VTT GC 6466
mods.installNotes: Turbo access requires removing the intake manifold and heat shields. Upgraded fuel injectors and HPFP recommended. Custom tune mandatory. Upgraded clutch on manual cars. 15+ hour job.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Fully adjustable coilovers transform the A90 from GT car to precision track tool with adjustable ride height, damping, and spring rates.
mods.partNumbers: KW V3 35208013, Ohlins Road & Track BMS MN02S1
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement at all corners. Adaptive damper delete via coding. Set initial height 20mm below stock. Mid-range damping for street. Alignment and corner balance required.
